message:
ci: Update CI workflow and Makefile targets

Adjusts CI configuration and build targets:

- Update CI workflow steps
- Refine Makefile targets for test execution

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -193,6 +193,8 @@ jobs:
         env:
           RCH_MOCK_SSH: '1'
           RCH_LOG_LEVEL: debug
+          E2E_LOG_DIR: test-results/e2e-logs
+          E2E_JUNIT_FILE: test-results/e2e-logs/junit.xml
         run: |
           chmod +x scripts/e2e_test.sh
           ./scripts/e2e_test.sh 2>&1 | tee e2e-output.log
@@ -201,7 +203,9 @@ jobs:
         uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
         with:
           name: e2e-logs
-          path: e2e-output.log
+          path: |
+            e2e-output.log
+            test-results/e2e-logs/
           retention-days: 14
 
   # Performance benchmark - verify latency budgets from AGENTS.md

@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
-.PHONY: coverage coverage-check
+.PHONY: coverage coverage-check e2e
 
 CARGO_TARGET_DIR ?= target
 
@@ -8,3 +8,6 @@ coverage:
 
 coverage-check:
 	cargo llvm-cov --workspace --fail-under-lines 80
+
+e2e:
+	./scripts/e2e_test.sh
